name: CVS HEALTH Corp
summary: CVS Health Corporation is a leading health solutions company operating four segments: Health Care Benefits (Aetna), Health Services, Pharmacy & Consumer Wellness, and Corporate/Other. It serves over 37 million members through health insurance products, operates approximately 9,000 retail locations, more than 1,000 walk-in and primary care medical clinics, a pharmacy benefits manager with ~87 million plan members, and offers Medicare Advantage, Medicare PDP, Medicaid, commercial medical, dental, behavioral health, and specialty pharmacy solutions.

products.name: Medicare Advantage Plans
products.description: HMO and PPO plans for Medicare-eligible individuals offered in 44 states and Washington D.C. in 2025.

products.name: Medicare Part D Prescription Drug Plan (PDP)
products.description: National prescription drug benefit plans offered in all 50 states and Washington D.C. for Medicare-eligible individuals.

products.name: Medicare Supplement Plans
products.description: Supplemental coverage for health care costs not covered by Original Medicare, offered in 49 states and Washington D.C.

products.name: Commercial Medical Plans
products.description: POS, PPO, HMO, and Indemnity plans for large, mid-sized, and small employers, individuals, and expatriates.

products.name: Health Savings Accounts (HSAs)
products.description: Consumer-directed health plans combining POS or PPO coverage with an accumulating benefit account funded by sponsors or members.

products.name: Medical Stop Loss Insurance
products.description: Coverage for self-insured employers assuming risk for large individual claims or aggregate losses above a pre-set annual threshold.

products.name: Medicaid and CHIP Services
products.description: Health care management services for Medicaid and CHIP-eligible individuals offered in 15 states on Insured or ASC basis.

products.name: Duals Coverage
products.description: Health coverage for beneficiaries dually eligible for Medicare and Medicaid, coordinating 100% of care with additional services.

products.name: Dental Plans
products.description: Dental coverage offered as part of the Health Care Benefits segment's complementary health products portfolio.

products.name: Behavioral Health and Employee Assistance Products
products.description: Behavioral health and employee assistance products complementing Commercial Medical offerings.

products.name: Pharmacy Benefits Management
products.description: Pharmacy benefits management services for approximately 87 million plan members through the Health Services segment.

products.name: Specialty Pharmacy Solutions
products.description: Expanding specialty pharmacy solutions offered as part of CVS Health's integrated health model.

products.name: Walk-in and Primary Care Medical Clinics
products.description: More than 1,000 walk-in and primary care medical clinic locations providing direct patient care services.

products.name: Administrative Services Contract (ASC) Products
products.description: Plan administration products where the plan sponsor assumes the majority of medical and dental care cost risk.

partnerships.partner_name: U.S. Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS)
partnerships.description: Annual contracts to offer Medicare Advantage HMO and PPO products and Medicare Part D prescription drug plans.
Health plan accreditation for Aetna HMO plans and nationwide PPO Health Plan accreditation through ALIC.
Accreditation for provider credentialing and Credentials Verification Organization (CVO) functions.
Company requires participating hospitals to be certified or accredited by The Joint Commission.
Company requires participating hospitals to be accredited by the American Osteopathic Association.
Company requires participating hospitals to be accredited by Det Norske Veritas Healthcare.
